Run `bd onboard` to get started. 4: 5: ## Quick Reference 6: 7: ```bash 8: bd ready # Find available work 9: bd show <id> # View issue details 10: bd update <id> --claim # Claim work atomically 11: bd close <id> # Complete work 12: bd dolt push # Push beads data to remote 13: ``` 14: 15: ## Non-Interactive Shell Commands 16: 17: **ALWAYS use non-interactive flags** with file operations to avoid hanging on confirmation prompts. 18: 19: Shell commands like `cp`, `mv`, and `rm` may be aliased to include `-i` (interactive) mode on some systems, causing the agent to hang indefinitely waiting for y/n input. 20: 21: …

meta.toolResultPreview: 1: --- 2: title: Features 3: --- 4: 5: # Features 6: 7: termigram combines an interactive command-line client with automation-friendly one-shot commands. 8: 9: ## Core CLI features 10: 11: - Interactive login and chat usage 12: - One-shot command mode for scripts and bots 13: - Saved session reuse across runs 14: - Direct messaging by user id or `@username` 15: - Contact listing and username prefix search 16: 17: ## Interactive commands 18: 19: Common interactive commands include: 20: 21: - `\me` 22: - `\contacts` 23: - `\find <prefix>` 24: - `\msg <id|@username> <text>` 25: - `\to <id|@username>` 26: - `\reply [message-id|query]` 27: - `\cancelreply` 28: - `\image <source> [caption]` 29: - …
